settings.heading: Self-serve resources, toolkits and practical business documents
settings.text: Use Essentials for trustworthy templates, toolkits, checklists, prepared resources and supported options that help you move without starting a full engagement.

settings.heading: Confirmed resources and supported options
settings.text: Start with real RBP templates, toolkits and service pathways. Some items are self-serve, while others may require intake, preparation or delivery support.

settings.title: Online Membership Terms and Conditions Template
settings.text: A practical template for membership terms, access rules and customer-facing conditions.

settings.title: Marketplace Seller Compliance Toolkit
settings.text: A toolkit for sellers managing marketplace terms, listings, refunds and customer communications.

settings.title: Individual On-Demand Services
settings.text: Browse support options when the resource needs review, setup or business-specific delivery.

settings.heading: Know what kind of support you are choosing
settings.text: Essentials separates self-serve resources from prepared or supported options so expectations are clear before purchase or enquiry.

settings.title: Self-serve support
settings.text: Use templates and toolkits when you need a practical starting point and can adapt the output yourself.

settings.title: Prepared delivery
settings.text: Some resources are made to order or require onboarding before the final document or pack is delivered.

settings.title: Deployed options
settings.text: Toolkit variants may include deployment support, setup help or a higher-touch implementation pathway.

settings.heading: Essentials questions
settings.text: Use these answers to set expectations before checkout or enquiry.

settings.question: Are all resources instant downloads?
settings.answer: No. Some products are instant or digital, while others are made to order, prepared after onboarding, or available in deployed service variants. Check the product page before purchase.

settings.question: Can resources be tailored?
settings.answer: Some products include deployed, plus or premium options where additional support may be available. If the product does not clearly fit, contact support before purchase.

settings.question: What if I am not sure which resource is right?
settings.answer: Start with Support or Advisory if the business issue needs a decision before you buy a resource.

settings.heading: Browse confirmed resources
settings.text: Start with confirmed resources and service pathways that are already available in the store.
